lex.bot.dialogaction.CfnAbout: Defines the action that the bot executes at runtime when the conversation reaches this step.

lex.bot.dialogaction.SlotToElicit.Description: If the dialog action is `ElicitSlot`, defines the slot to elicit from the user.

lex.bot.dialogaction.SuppressNextMessage.Description: When true the next message for the intent is not used.

lex.bot.dialogaction.Type.Description: The action that the bot should execute.
lex.bot.dialogaction.Type.Allowed values: CloseIntent | ConfirmIntent | ElicitIntent | ElicitSlot | EndConversation | EvaluateConditional | FulfillIntent | InvokeDialogCodeHook | StartIntent
